builtin.focusSuccess: Chat history cleared. Sandbox environment retained.

externalAgents.title: External Agents
externalAgents.description: Configure external AI agents (e.g. Claude Code, Codex CLI) for task delegation.
externalAgents.emptyHint: Add an external agent to enable the delegate_to_agent tool.
externalAgents.tauriAutoDetect: In Tauri mode, locally installed CLI agents are automatically detected.
externalAgents.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this agent?
externalAgents.name: Name
externalAgents.nameDuplicate: An agent with this name already exists
externalAgents.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe this agent's capabilities (helps LLM choose the right agent)
externalAgents.maxTurnsHint: Safety limit on tool call rounds (1 turn = 1 tool call)
externalAgents.authModeHint: Subscription uses the agent's own login (ChatGPT Plus, Claude Max, etc.) — no API key needed. API Key injects keys from the agent's environment.
externalAgents.loginOpenUrl: Open this link in your browser to authorize:
externalAgents.loginCodePlaceholder: Paste the code shown in your browser
externalAgents.loginNotScriptable: This agent can't log in from here — use Import below instead.

developer.showSystemMessagesDesc: Display AI system prompts in chat
developer.showSystemMessagesWarning: System messages for development debugging only.
developer.title: Developer

securityPolicy.title: Security Policy
securityPolicy.description: Control how the AI agent handles tool execution. Configure permission rules with last-match-wins semantics.
securityPolicy.approvalTimeoutDesc: Seconds to wait for your approval before auto-resolving a tool call.
securityPolicy.timeoutBehaviorDesc: Action to take when approval times out. "Deny" rejects the tool call; "Allow" auto-approves it.
securityPolicy.rulesDesc: Define permission rules for tool execution. Uses fnmatch syntax. Later rules override earlier ones (last-match-wins).
securityPolicy.noRules: No permission rules configured. Default rules apply (terminal commands and external tools require approval).
securityPolicy.blacklistDesc: These dangerous command patterns are always blocked and cannot be overridden.
securityPolicy.pathPolicyDesc: Control which filesystem paths the AI agent can access. Forbidden paths are always blocked.
securityPolicy.forbiddenPathsDesc: These sensitive paths are always blocked and cannot be overridden by any configuration.
securityPolicy.allowedRootsDesc: Additional filesystem paths the agent is allowed to access (outside workspace).
securityPolicy.noAllowedRoots: No additional paths configured. Agent can only access workspace directory.

privacy.title: PII Privacy Protection
privacy.description: Detect and handle personally identifiable information (PII) in conversations. Supports automatic redaction and blocking of sensitive data.
privacy.enableDesc: Automatically detect phone numbers, ID cards, bank cards, emails and other PII in messages and tool calls.

routing.title: Privacy-Aware Model Routing
routing.description: Route LLM requests to a local model when sensitive data is detected, keeping private data off the cloud.
routing.noLocalModelWarning: You have selected a local routing strategy but no local model is configured. Routing will fall back to cloud for all requests.

advanced.title: Advanced PII Configuration
advanced.description: Define custom keywords, regex patterns, and sensitive tools to extend the built-in PII detection rules.
advanced.keywordsS2Desc: Words that should be treated as sensitive (S2). Minimum 2 characters.
advanced.keywordsS3Desc: Words that should be treated as confidential (S3).
advanced.patternsS2Desc: Regex patterns to detect sensitive content.
advanced.patternsS3Desc: Regex patterns to detect confidential content.
advanced.toolsS2Desc: Tool calls that should trigger S2 protection.
advanced.toolsS3Desc: Tool calls that should trigger S3 protection.
advanced.keywordTooShort: Keyword must be at least 2 characters
advanced.testMatchPlaceholder: Enter text to test against your rules...

privacy.pseudonymizeHint: Pseudonymize mode replaces PII with typed semantic placeholders before sending to the cloud. The AI retains full semantic understanding while original values are restored locally. Zero privacy leakage, zero quality loss.
privacy.deepScanDesc: Use LLM to detect non-structured PII (medical history, family relations, workplace, etc.) that regex patterns cannot catch. May increase latency.

domainAllowlist.title: Domain Allowlist
domainAllowlist.description: Control which domains the AI agent can access via browser and network tools. Only listed domains are allowed.
domainAllowlist.hitlDesc: When enabled, accessing unlisted domains will prompt for your approval instead of being blocked directly.
domainAllowlist.listDesc: Domains or patterns the agent is permitted to access (e.g. *.example.com, api.github.com).
domainAllowlist.empty: No domains configured. When the allowlist is empty, all domains are allowed by default.
domainAllowlist.invalidDomain: Invalid domain format. Use patterns like example.com or *.example.com
domainAllowlist.duplicateDomain: This domain is already in the allowlist

yoloMode.title: YOLO-Modus (Alle automatisch genehmigen)
yoloMode.description: Wenn aktiviert, werden alle Tool-Aufrufe automatisch ohne manuelle Bestätigung genehmigt. Geeignet für Entwicklung, Batch-Aufgaben und vertrauenswürdige Umgebungen.
yoloMode.enableDesc: Wenn aktiviert, werden alle Tool-Aufrufe ohne Benutzerbestätigung automatisch genehmigt.

warning.title: Sicherheitswarnung
warning.message: Der YOLO-Modus umgeht alle Sicherheitsprüfungen. Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie dem KI-Modell und der Umgebung vertrauen, bevor Sie diese Funktion aktivieren.
warning.point1: Alle Dateioperationen werden ohne Bestätigung ausgeführt
warning.point2: Alle Netzwerkanfragen werden ohne Bestätigung ausgeführt
warning.point3: Alle Shell-Befehle werden ohne Bestätigung ausgeführt

useCases.title: Empfohlene Anwendungsfälle
useCases.case4: Vertrauenswürdige Umgebungen mit hohem Vertrauen in KI-Verhalten

allowlist.title: Allowlist Records (Allow Always)
allowlist.description: Manage operations marked as 'Allow Always'. These operations will auto-approve without prompts.

notice.title: Security Notice
notice.description: Manage allowlist records carefully. Deleted records will restore approval flow.

clearConfirm.title: Confirm Clear All Records
clearConfirm.description: This will clear all {count} allowlist records. All auto-approved operations will restore approval flow. This action cannot be undone.

riskRules.title: Risk Rules
riskRules.description: Manage sensitive data detection rules to prevent data leaks in LLM conversations. Use untrusted third-party model APIs (e.g. proxy services) with caution to avoid sensitive data being maliciously analyzed and exploited.
riskRules.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
riskRules.builtinCannotEditPattern: Built-in rule patterns cannot be modified
riskRules.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description or ID...
riskRules.importError: Import failed, please check file format

cn_mobile_number.desc: Detect Chinese mainland mobile phone numbers.

bank_card_context.name: Bank card context

resume_cv_keywords.name: Resume or CV content
resume_cv_keywords.desc: Detect resume and curriculum vitae related content.

api_key_like.name: API key / cloud credential
api_key_like.desc: Detect common API key and cloud credential patterns.

credential_assignment.name: Credential assignment
credential_assignment.desc: Detect explicit password, secret, token, or API key assignment.

cookie_session_like.name: Cookie / session secret
cookie_session_like.desc: Detect session, cookie, and authorization wording.

db_connection_string.name: Database connection string
db_connection_string.desc: Detect connection strings for databases, caches, and queues.

env_file_secret.name: Environment secret variable
env_file_secret.desc: Detect common secret variable names in env-style content.

internal_domain_name.name: Internal domain / hostname
internal_domain_name.desc: Detect common internal domain and system naming patterns.

internal_hostname_pattern.name: Internal host naming
internal_hostname_pattern.desc: Detect internal hostnames and environment-specific resource names.

kubernetes_service_dns.name: K8s service DNS
kubernetes_service_dns.desc: Detect Kubernetes internal service DNS references.

project_codename_keywords.name: Project codename / roadmap
project_codename_keywords.desc: Detect project codename or unreleased roadmap wording.

org_roster_keywords.name: Organization roster / directory
org_roster_keywords.desc: Detect organization charts, rosters, and internal directories.

salary_hr_keywords.name: Salary / HR data
salary_hr_keywords.desc: Detect compensation, payroll, and HR evaluation wording.

customer_list_keywords.name: Customer list / contacts
customer_list_keywords.desc: Detect customer roster and contact-list style wording.

contract_quote_keywords.name: Contract / quote document
contract_quote_keywords.desc: Detect contract, quotation, or tender document wording.

crm_ticket_keywords.name: CRM / ticket data
crm_ticket_keywords.desc: Detect CRM notes, ticket content, or customer profile wording.

financial_metrics_keywords.name: Financial metrics / budget
financial_metrics_keywords.desc: Detect financial metrics, budgets, and profitability wording.

invoice_tax_keywords.name: Invoice / tax info
invoice_tax_keywords.desc: Detect invoice and tax identifier wording.

legal_document_keywords.name: Legal / compliance document
legal_document_keywords.desc: Detect legal opinions, disputes, and NDA style wording.

political_person_org_keywords.name: Political institution / official
political_person_org_keywords.desc: Detect political institutions, officials, and related wording.

military_security_keywords.name: Military / national security
military_security_keywords.desc: Detect military deployment, weapons, and national security wording.

extremism_keywords.name: Extremism / violence
extremism_keywords.desc: Detect extremist, violent attack, and bomb-making wording.

profile.title: Security Profile
profile.description: Select a pre-built security profile or customize below.

autoReview.title: Smart Intent Guard
autoReview.description: Use an LLM to automatically review high-risk tool calls (like shell commands or network requests) against your original intent. If the action matches your intent, it is silently approved, reducing interruption fatigue.
autoReview.enableDesc: When enabled, an LLM will evaluate potentially dangerous tool calls before interrupting you.
autoReview.modelRecommendation: Recommendation: Use a fast, low-cost model like GPT-4o-mini or Claude 3 Haiku for optimal latency.
autoReview.selectModelFirst: Please select a reviewer model before enabling Smart Intent Guard.
autoReview.disabledNoModel: Smart Intent Guard disabled — no model selected.
autoReview.noModelWarning: Please select a reviewer model to enable Smart Intent Guard. Without a dedicated model, the guard cannot function.
autoReview.shellEscalationHint: Note: In Smart Intent Guard mode, high-risk operations (e.g. shell commands) will be reviewed by the security model even if your permission rules set them to "Allow". Trivially safe commands (ls, cat, git status, etc.) are fast-tracked without LLM review.

nlGenerator.sectionDesc: Describe your security requirements in natural language and let AI generate the configuration.
nlGenerator.title: Smart Generate
nlGenerator.description: Describe your security needs in natural language and AI will generate corresponding permission rules, path policies, and network allowlist configurations.
nlGenerator.placeholder: e.g., Block all file deletion commands, only allow access to the project directory and /tmp, only allow github.com and npm-related domains

retrieval.embeddingModelDescription: Text vectorization model for semantic search (runs locally)
retrieval.embeddingModelDescriptionSaas: Text vectorization model for semantic search (free for subscribers)
retrieval.rerankerModelDescription: Search result reranking model for better relevance (runs locally)
retrieval.rerankerModelDescriptionSaas: Search result reranking model for better relevance (free for subscribers)
retrieval.apiKeyHint: Get API key from provider website, or enter custom key for local service
retrieval.apiBaseHint: Only required when using custom service

retrieval.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. They will be saved automatically in 1 second.
retrieval.saveSuccessDesc: Your retrieval service configuration has been saved successfully.
retrieval.saveErrorDesc: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.

validation.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields
validation.missingApiBase: Custom provider requires API Base URL

hint.title: Embedding and reranking models can significantly improve search quality and reduce token consumption during web search and page reading, and their cost is far lower than LLMs.
hint.options: You can use free or paid service provider models. For ultimate privacy, you can deploy open-source models locally in OpenAI-compatible format.
hint.recommendation: Multilingual models are recommended and can be selected based on actual usage.
hint.deployQuestion: How to deploy OpenAI-compatible open-source embedding and reranking model services locally

advancedRetrieval.title: Advanced Retrieval
advancedRetrieval.description: Optimize web search and page reading quality with embedding and reranking models
advancedRetrieval.toggleLabel: Optimize web search and scraping results
advancedRetrieval.toggleDescription: When enabled, only the most useful content is provided to the LLM. Embedding and reranking models significantly improve search quality and reduce token consumption at a much lower cost than LLMs. Recommended to enable (requires embedding and reranking model configuration)
advancedRetrieval.modelsRequired: Please configure and apply embedding and reranking models first
advancedRetrieval.cannotEnable: Please configure and apply embedding and reranking models in the Default Model page first

validationMessages.missingRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields

mediaGeneration.imageDescription: Configure image generation model, enable via toggle in chat
mediaGeneration.videoDescription: Configure video generation provider and model, enable via toggle in chat
mediaGeneration.apiKeyHint: Please configure the API Key for this provider. The key will be shared globally across all features using this provider.

acp.title: ACP Agents
acp.description: Configure and manage ACP (Agent Client Protocol) coding agents like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.
acp.loginHint: After installation, run this command to login
acp.oauthHint: Click the button below to authenticate via OAuth
acp.acpExplanation: ACP (Agent Client Protocol) is an open protocol that allows editors and IDEs to communicate with AI coding agents like Claude Code and Gemini CLI. Once enabled, you can select the corresponding preset agent in Agent mode for coding.
acp.addModelHint: Manually add model IDs if auto-discovery fails
acp.noModels: No models. Click refresh or add manually above

modelService.title: Model Service
modelService.description: Configure model providers and API keys
modelService.keyEnabled: Enabled · Participates in key pool rotation
modelService.keyDisabled: Disabled · Excluded from key pool rotation
modelService.keyPoolActive: {count} keys participating in auto load balancing & failover
modelService.noActiveKey: Please add and enable an API key first
modelService.noEnabledModels: Please enable at least one model first
modelService.addKeyFirst: Please add an API key first
modelService.apiUrlHint: Usually no modification needed, use default URL
modelService.modelNameHint: Enter a model name supported by the provider, availability will be validated when enabled
modelService.addModelHint: Click the button below to add a model
modelService.modelInfoNotFoundHint: You can manually add it in model settings. This info is used to display model costs and context usage
modelService.providerDisabledDescription: Please turn on the provider switch to use this model
modelService.modelEnabledButProviderOffHint: Please turn on the provider switch to use this model
modelService.selectProvider: Please select a provider from the left
modelService.providerNameHint: Give your custom provider an easily recognizable name
modelService.providerTypeHint: Select the API type compatible with your provider
modelService.customProviderNotice: You can add any provider compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini API format. When using proxy/relay services, please be mindful of data privacy.

modelInfo.title: Model Config
modelInfo.refreshNoDataDesc: This model may not be in LiteLLM database. You can manually edit the info.
modelInfo.noInfoHint: No info for this model. You can fill it in manually.
modelInfo.pleaseEditModelInfo: Click the settings icon to edit model info (context, pricing, etc.)
modelInfo.extraParamsHint:
Provider-specific params passed directly to the API. Examples:
OpenAI: '{' "reasoning_effort": "high" '}'
Anthropic/MiniMax: '{' "thinking": '{' "type": "enabled", "budget_tokens": 5000 '}' '}'
modelInfo.pricingHint: Cost per million tokens. Required for accurate cost tracking of self-hosted models.

modelImport.title: Model List
modelImport.description: Select models to import into this provider.
modelImport.providerNotFound: No model data available for this provider
modelImport.apiFailedDesc: Unable to fetch model list from provider API
modelImport.apiFetchFailed: This provider does not support fetching model list. Please add models manually
modelImport.fallbackToModelsDev: Will use models.dev to fetch model list
modelImport.allAddedDesc: All available models have been added to the list
modelImport.modelsDevFallbackHint: This provider does not support model list API. Models below are from the models.dev community database and may not match your actual available models.

migrateProvider.title: Migrate Provider {name}
migrateProvider.description: Batch migrate all agents using this provider to a new provider and model.
migrateProvider.noAgentsToMigrate: No agents are using this provider. No migration needed.

deleteProvider.title: Delete Provider {name}
deleteProvider.description: Please review the usage of this provider before deleting.
deleteProvider.warningDescription: This provider is being used by {count} agent(s). Force deleting will clear these references.
deleteProvider.safeToDelete: No agents are using this provider. Safe to delete.

modelService.apiKeySecurityHint: Your key will be encrypted with AES-256-GCM
modelService.apiUrlHintWithAlternatives: Select endpoint region above, or use custom URL

speedTest.title: Speed Test
speedTest.description: Measure response latency and throughput for all enabled models
speedTest.noModels: No enabled models found. Please enable at least one model first.

cookbook.title: Hardware & Model Cookbook
cookbook.description: Smart model recommendation based on your local hardware specs
cookbook.warningDesc: Some models require more VRAM than available. Forcing them to run may cause system instability or Out of Memory (OOM) errors.

defaultModel.localModelWarning: Local lightweight models are highly prone to hallucinate or fall into infinite loops when processing complex Agent toolchains. For long tasks, it's recommended to use 30B+ scale models or cloud-based advanced models (like Claude 3.5 Sonnet).
defaultModel.baseModelDescription: Main AI assistant model for conversations
defaultModel.liteModelDescription: Model for context summarization and other lightweight tasks, reducing costs
defaultModel.liteModelContextWindowWarning: The lightweight model has a smaller context window than the primary model. During long conversations, summarization quality may degrade due to context overflow. Consider choosing a lightweight model with a context window no smaller than the primary model.
defaultModel.fallbackModelDescription: Automatically switches to this model when the primary model encounters errors (rate limit, timeout, billing, etc.)
defaultModel.noEnabledModels: Please enable models in Model Service first
defaultModel.noDeploymentsHint: No model deployments added yet. Click the button below to add a model.
defaultModel.loadBalancingHint: When multiple models are configured, the system will load balance based on the routing strategy.

routing.label: Routing Strategy
routing.description: When multiple models are configured, the system will load balance based on the selected strategy. Weighted Random is recommended for best performance.

simple-shuffle.name: Weighted Random
simple-shuffle.description: Pick based on weight, RPM or TPM (Recommended for production)

rate-limit-aware-v2.name: Rate Limit Aware
rate-limit-aware-v2.description: Filter deployments exceeding TPM/RPM limits, route to lowest usage

latency-based.name: Latency Based
latency-based.description: Pick deployment with lowest response time

least-busy.name: Least Busy
least-busy.description: Pick deployment with least ongoing calls

defaultModel.acpAutoSwitchedDescription: Configured {agentName} automatically, redirecting to chat page

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.description: Automatically select the optimal model tier based on task complexity
smartRouting.lightModelDescription: Cheaper model for simple tasks (e.g., casual chat, short Q&A)
smartRouting.standardModelDescription: Uses the Base Model configured above. No additional configuration needed.
smartRouting.reasoningModelDescription: Model for complex reasoning tasks (e.g., mathematical proofs, system architecture design). Supports enabling thinking mode via model parameters.

retrieval.embeddingModelDescription: Text vectorization model for semantic search across knowledge base, memory, web search, and other capabilities
retrieval.rerankerModelDescription: Search result reranking model for semantic ranking across knowledge base, memory, web search, and other capabilities
retrieval.apiKeyHint: Get API key from provider's website, or enter custom key for local services
retrieval.apiBaseHint: Custom API endpoint for OpenAI-compatible services

defaultModel.visionFallbackModelDescription: Automatically converts images to text when the primary model lacks vision support. Recommended: cheap multimodal models like gpt-4o-mini.

account.title: Account
account.localUserMode: Local User Mode - Data stored locally

subscription.title: Subscription Plan
subscription.proDescription: You have full access to power-user features including high-speed searches, priority API access, and expert-mode agents.
subscription.freeDescription: Upgrade to experience the full potential of AI-driven research. Get 10x more usage and unlock professional analysis tools.

security.title: Data Security
security.serverEncryptionDescription: Sensitive configs like API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM at rest. Keys are never exposed in transit.

credentials.title: Credentials Management
credentials.description: Manage credential files required by skills
credentials.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this credential? This action cannot be undone.
credentials.oauthDescription: Manage your enterprise logins and SaaS API authorizations securely. These credentials are bound ephemerally to your active agent sessions for world-class capability inheritance.
credentials.connectDesc: Authorize agent to interact with {name} on your behalf.
credentials.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your PAT or OAuth bearer token here
credentials.disconnectConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to disconnect your {name} integration? This will revoke the agent's permission to run tasks on your behalf.
credentials.vaultDescription: Speichern Sie Passwörter und TOTP-Seeds sicher für Browser-/Desktop-Automatisierung. Geheimnisse werden verschlüsselt und nie dem LLM-Kontext ausgesetzt.
credentials.vaultDialogDesc: Speichern Sie Passwörter und TOTP-Seeds sicher. Sie werden nie dem LLM-Kontext ausgesetzt.
credentials.vaultDeleteDesc: Möchten Sie die Zugangsdaten "{label}" wirklich löschen? Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.

consolidation.title: Skill Consolidation

consolidation.minClusterSizeDesc: Minimum skills required in a cluster to trigger consolidation
consolidation.similarityThresholdDesc: Minimum semantic similarity (0-1) to group skills

consolidation.confirmDesc: This will merge {count} skill(s) into umbrella skills. Archived skills can be restored anytime.

detail.title: Skill Details
detail.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
detail.enableSuccessDesc: Skill "{name}" is now enabled and can be used in conversations
detail.scanBlockedDesc: Skill "{name}" is blocked by security scan due to {count} security finding(s). You can review the findings below and choose to force-enable at your own risk.
detail.forceEnableDesc: The skill has been enabled despite security warnings
detail.optimizePlaceholder: Describe the optimization (e.g., support concurrent requests)
detail.optimizeStartedDesc: Optimization for "{name}" submitted. Review it in Skill Growth.
detail.evolutionLockHint: Prevent auto-evolution from modifying this skill
detail.evolutionUnlockedDesc: "{name}" can now be auto-evolved by the Agent

upload.title: Upload Custom Skill
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop archive here, or click to select
upload.previewHint: Preview will be shown after uploading files
upload.name: Skill Name
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the skill's functionality and purpose
upload.networkWarning: Skills run in a secure sandbox without network access. Network-dependent skills are not supported. For network operations, please use MCP services or deploy Myrm AI locally.

skills.loginRequiredDesc: Login to enable skills from the market or upload custom skills

local.title: Local Skill Paths
local.description: Configure local skill scanning paths, the system will automatically scan skills in these directories
local.pathFormatHint: Path must be absolute (starts with /) or start with ~
local.emptyDesc: Configure local skill paths or place skills in the default directory

error.pathFormat: Path must be absolute or start with ~

search.emptyDesc: Versuchen Sie, die Suchkriterien anzupassen oder Filter zu löschen

history.title: Auto-Learned History
history.confirmRollback: Are you sure you want to undo {name} and roll back to the previous version?

growth.title: Skill Growth
growth.description: Review pending learnings, auto-applied captures, and blocked changes in one unified queue.
growth.loadFailed: Failed to load skill growth cases
growth.authRequired: Sign in to review skill growth cases.
growth.reviseFailedScan: "{name}" revised but failed security scan. Please fix the flagged issues.
growth.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Describe what should change before this growth case can be applied.

empty.title: No cases in this view
empty.description: Recent skill growth activity will appear here after the agent captures or reviews improvements.

export.title: Export Skill: {name}
export.description: Review content before exporting. Sensitive information will be redacted automatically.
export.safeDescription: No sensitive information (API keys, absolute paths) detected in this skill.
export.warningDescription: We found potentially sensitive information. It is highly recommended to export the redacted version.

instances.title: Instance Manager
instances.noInstances: No instances yet. Create one to get started.
instances.envOverridesDescription: Override environment variables for this instance (e.g. API keys, tokens)
instances.configOverridesDescription: Override configuration values for this instance (JSON format)
instances.createDialogDescription: Create a new configuration instance for {skill}
instances.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete instance "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

settings.invalidProvider: Invalid provider, please check backend logs
settings.baseUrlPlaceholder: Provider API URL or custom URL (built-in common provider URLs don't need to be filled in, see litellm documentation)
settings.baseUrlTooltip: The API base URL of the model provider, must start with http or https, some providers can be automatically obtained, please refer to litellm documentation
settings.baseUrlFormatError: Base URL must be a valid URL format and start with http or https
settings.modelAndApiKeyRequired: Model and API key are required
settings.modelValidationFailed: Model validation failed, please check your settings.
settings.modelTooltip: Based on litellm, refer to supported models
settings.modelKwargsTooltip: Model-specific parameters, use JSON format, supports nested structures
settings.modelFormatError: Model must be in provider/model format (e.g., anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620)
settings.userInstructionsPlaceholder: Customize global instructions to guide response style, etc.
settings.timezoneDescription: Set your timezone for scheduled tasks and time-related responses.
settings.notificationChannelDesc: Send notifications via IM channels when new pairing requests or other events occur.
settings.imTargetPlaceholderPhone: Phone number with country code, e.g. 8613812345678
settings.noImChannelsConnected: No IM channels available. Please configure and enable an IM channel in Channel settings first.

searchService.noConfigsDesc: Add a search service configuration to enable web search in conversations
searchService.configNamePlaceholder: Enter custom name, defaults to service provider name
searchService.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?
searchService.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this search service configuration? This action cannot be undone.
searchService.enableConflictDescription: A {role} service "{currentName}" is currently enabled. Enabling "{newName}" will automatically disable "{currentName}". Continue?
searchService.configNameDuplicate: A configuration with this name already exists
searchService.searxngRegionPresetTooltip: Preset engines and language for SearXNG (global, China, code, academic)
searchService.startSearxngFailed: Could not start SearXNG. Check Docker is installed and running
searchService.searchOptionalHint: Search is optional — you can configure it later

searxngInstall.title: Install and enable SearXNG?
searxngInstall.description: You chose local free search (SearXNG). After you confirm we will:
searxngInstall.stepDocker: Start SearXNG via Docker on this machine (http://127.0.0.1:8081)
searxngInstall.stepConfigure: Add the search configuration automatically (no manual URL)
searxngInstall.stepEnable: Enable it as your web search service

searchService.quickEnableFailed: No free search backend detected. Add a configuration manually.

settings.searchServiceTypeTooltip: Select a search service provider (built-in search service or third-party providers)
settings.apiBaseTooltip: The base URL of your search service instance (required for SearxNG)
settings.extraParamsTooltip: Provider-specific parameters in JSON format (e.g., topic, search_depth for Tavily; engines, categories for SearxNG)
settings.searchServiceRoleTooltip: Primary: preferred search service. Fallback: automatically takes over when primary is unavailable. Maximum: 1 primary + 1 fallback enabled simultaneously
settings.onlyOnePrimaryService: Only one primary service is allowed. Please disable the existing primary service or select fallback role
settings.onlyOneFallbackService: Only one fallback service is allowed. Please disable the existing fallback service or select primary role
settings.searxngSandboxWarning: SearXNG requires local deployment and is not available in Sandbox mode. Please switch to local deployment mode or choose another search service.

webTts.providerDesc: Choose the text-to-speech service for reading messages aloud
webTts.browserDesc: Uses native browser speech synthesis, zero cost and zero latency
webTts.openaiDesc: High-quality voices, requires API Key configured in Voice settings
webTts.elevenlabsDesc: Ultra-realistic voices with multilingual and emotional expression
webTts.fishAudioDesc: Cost-effective, 2M+ community voices, supports voice cloning
webTts.edgeDesc: Microsoft Edge speech service, free to use

settings.webNotificationsDesc: When enabled, the browser will receive real-time system notifications such as pairing requests.
settings.completionSoundDesc: Einen sanften Ton abspielen, wenn die KI-Antwort abgeschlossen ist und die Seite nicht im Vordergrund ist.
settings.fetchRawWebpageDesc: By default, only main content is extracted (ads/sidebars removed). Enable to keep raw webpage content (may increase token usage, recommended only when needed)
settings.generateSearchSuggestionsDesc: Generate follow-up question suggestions after each response
settings.enableCostEstimationDesc: Show token usage statistics in conversations
settings.enableCacheBreakNotificationDesc: Show a toast notification when prompt cache is invalidated (e.g. model switch, TTL expiry)
settings.enableEvalLabDesc: Enable evaluation lab for testing and benchmarking agent performance
settings.showContextUsageDesc: Show context window usage progress ring next to the input box
settings.codeExecutionAllowNetworkDesc: Allow Agent-executed code to access the network (e.g. pip install, API calls). Disabling blocks all network access in sandboxed code execution.
settings.enableAutoTitleGenerationDesc: Use lightweight model to auto-generate chat titles (consumes tokens)
settings.configImportExportDesc: Export all current configurations to a JSON file, or import configurations from a JSON file
settings.configExportNote: Export function saves all current configurations to a JSON file
settings.configImportNote: Import function will overwrite current configuration, please operate with caution
settings.configBackupNote: It is recommended to export current configuration as backup before importing
settings.configClipboardNote: Copy/Paste function allows quick config sync between devices

datasetExport.title: Dataset Export
datasetExport.description: Export conversation traces as standard fine-tuning datasets (ShareGPT / Alpaca / OpenAI JSONL) with PII redaction and quality filtering

importPreview.title: Import Preview
importPreview.description: Select items to import. Unchecked items will keep current settings
importPreview.versionMismatch: Version notice: Import file version is {version}, will be auto-migrated
importPreview.mcpImportSecurityBlocked: Import blocked: an MCP configuration failed the security scan
importPreview.mcpImportSecurityAckRequired: Import blocked: acknowledge high-risk MCP configurations in MCP settings first

exportWarning.title: Security Notice
exportWarning.message: The exported file contains sensitive information such as API keys. Please keep it secure and do not share it with others or upload to public platforms.

system.title: System Settings
system.description: WebUI service access and system-level configuration
system.desktopModeDescription: System settings are only available in Tauri desktop client
